footer.tagline: Digital menus for restaurants. Import, enhance with AI, translate, and share — all from one place.

landing.heroBadge: Built for restaurants that update menus every week
landing.heroSub1: Import, enhance with AI, share via QR — in minutes, not hours.
landing.heroSub2: Dain Menu is the workspace where your menu lives. AI handles the writing, translation, and allergens — you stay in control.
landing.heroFine: Free to start · No credit card · Works with any cuisine

steps.title: From zero to guest-ready in three steps
steps.subtitle: No design skills. No technical setup. No re-typing.

import.title: Import your menu
import.desc: Upload a PDF, photo, or paste your text — we extract categories, items, and prices automatically.
import.trust: Works with PDF, photo, or plain text — no re-typing required.

ai.title: AI writes and translates
ai.desc: Descriptions, allergens, and translations — reviewed by you before going live.
ai.after: Pan-seared free-range chicken, herb-crusted, with jasmine rice.

qr.title: Share via QR
qr.desc: One link, any device, updates instantly. Every guest sees the menu in their language.

aiProof.title: What AI actually does to your menu
aiProof.subtitle: Three things — each one takes seconds, each one would have taken hours manually.
aiProof.trust: You approve every change before guests see it.

languages.title: Your menu, in the language your guests speak.
languages.subtitle: Guests see the menu in their language automatically — no switching required.
languages.note: AI translates names, descriptions, and categories — guests always see your full menu.

guestShowcase.title:
Clean. Fast.
In their language.
guestShowcase.subtitle: No app download. No login. Just scan and read — in their language.

pricingEntry.text: Free to start — no card needed
pricingEntry.sub: 200 credits included. Enough to build and launch your full menu.

terminalCta.title: Ready to set up your digital menu?
terminalCta.subtitle: Start free. Your first QR code is 10 minutes away.
terminalCta.fine: No credit card · Cancel anytime · dainmenu.com

features.title: Everything you need to run a modern menu
features.subtitle: One platform. Import, improve, translate, and share — your menu stays fresh without the grind.

qr.title: QR Sharing Built In
qr.desc: Guests scan once. No app. No login. Works on any device, instantly updated.

ai.title: AI-Powered Writing
ai.desc: AI rewrites vague descriptions into vivid, guest-ready copy in seconds.

multilingual.title: 6 Guest Languages
multilingual.desc: Guests see your full menu automatically in their language — no switching required.

allergens.title: Allergen Detection
allergens.desc: AI reads your ingredients and tags allergens. You approve before guests see anything.

import.title: Import in 2 Minutes
import.desc: Upload a PDF or photo. We extract every item, category, and price automatically.

noapp.title: No App for Guests
noapp.desc: A link, a QR code, and a browser — that is all your guests need.

pricing.title: Pay for what you use. Nothing more.
pricing.subtitle: Simple, credit-based pricing

free.name: Free
free.tagline: Enough credits to improve a real 20-dish menu once.
highlights: Flag allergens on your full menu

whatIsCredit.a: One credit = one AI action on one item — like rewriting a description or adding a translation. Fully improving a 20-dish menu costs roughly 40–80 credits.

rollover.a: Free credits never expire. Monthly Starter and Pro credits reset at the start of each month.

contract.a: No. Cancel anytime — no notice period, no penalties.

sidebar.reviewTooltip_one: {{count}} item flagged for review — AI-generated or imported content that hasn't been manually confirmed yet.
sidebar.reviewTooltip_other: {{count}} items flagged for review — AI-generated or imported content that hasn't been manually confirmed yet.

service.carryoverDesc: You have {{items}} carrying over from the last service period.
service.carryingOver: carrying over from the last service period.

sections.importMenuSub: Upload a file or paste your menu text
sections.aiWaiting: AI updates waiting for your approval
sections.entryManualSub: Dish by dish in the builder
sections.entryScanSub: AI reads the photo for you
sections.popularItemsEmptyDesc: Mark items as popular in the Menu Builder to highlight them for guests.

needsReview.headline_one: {{n}} AI update waiting for your approval
needsReview.headline_other: {{n}} AI updates waiting for your approval
needsReview.body: AI has improved your menu. Review each change and approve before guests see it — you stay in control.

missingDescriptions.body: Guests rely on descriptions to choose dishes — especially in a language they're comfortable with. AI writes them in seconds.

incompleteTranslation.headline: {{langName}} is {{pct}}% translated
incompleteTranslation.body_one: {{remaining}} item still appears in your base language for {{langName}}-speaking guests. AI can complete it in one run.
incompleteTranslation.body_other: {{remaining}} items still appear in your base language for {{langName}}-speaking guests. AI can complete it in one run.

setName.headline: Set your restaurant name
setName.body: Your name goes at the top of the guest menu — it's the first thing diners see when they scan your QR code.

checkPreview.headline: Check the guest view
checkPreview.body: See the menu exactly as your guests will after scanning. Takes 30 seconds — check the layout, theme, and language before anyone scans.

enhance.headline: Translate and enhance your menu
enhance.body: AI rewrites descriptions, flags allergens, and translates your whole menu in one click. Guests in any language feel right at home.

getQR.headline: Generate and place your QR code
getQR.body: Your menu is ready. Print a QR code and put it on each table so guests can scan and browse on their own device.

qrReady.headline: Put your menu on every table
qrReady.body: Your menu is live. Generate a QR code, print it, and place it on your tables so guests can scan and browse on their own device.

dashboard.buddyAllClear: Your menu looks guest-ready right now.

menuBuilder.subtitle: {{name}} · {{count}} item across {{cats}} category
menuBuilder.search: Search by name, description, or allergen…
menuBuilder.scanTooltip: Take or upload a photo of a dish to add it instantly

reviewMode.title: Review mode — {{count}} item updated by AI
reviewMode.title_other: Review mode — {{count}} items updated by AI
reviewMode.desc: Approve each change before guests see it. The preview on the right reflects the current state.

reviewComplete.title: All AI changes approved
reviewComplete.desc: Your menu is up to date — guests will see the latest content.

dialogs.newItemDesc: Fill in the details to add a new dish to your menu.
dialogs.newCategoryDesc: Categories organize your menu. Drag the handle to reorder them any time.
dialogs.renameCategoryDesc: Update the display name for this menu section.
dialogs.deleteCategoryDesc: This will permanently delete "{{name}}" and all {{count}} item in it. This cannot be undone.
dialogs.deleteCategoryDesc_other: This will permanently delete "{{name}}" and all {{count}} items in it. This cannot be undone.
dialogs.deleteItemDesc: This will permanently remove "{{name}}" from your menu. This cannot be undone.
dialogs.scanDishDesc: Confirm the dish from your scan, then add it instantly.
dialogs.photoOptionalHint: Optional — add a photo or skip to create manually.
dialogs.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the dish — ingredients, preparation, what makes it special…
dialogs.descriptionHint: Tip: You can enhance this later using AI —

empty.title: Build your menu
empty.subtitle: Start by adding a category, import from an existing menu, or scan a dish photo to begin instantly.
empty.createCategoryHint: Group your dishes (Mains, Starters…) then add items one by one.
empty.importMenuHint: Paste text, upload a PDF, or describe your menu to AI.
empty.scanDishHint: Name a category first, then upload a photo — AI fills in the details.

toasts.categoryDuplicateExists: A category with this name already exists
toasts.cantIdentify: Couldn't identify a dish in that photo — fill in the details manually.
toasts.lowConfidence: Dish name is a rough guess — please review it before saving.
toasts.noCategoryForScan: Create a category first, then scan a dish.
toasts.reorderFailed_one: {{count}} category failed to save. Reloading from server.
toasts.reorderFailed_other: {{count}} categories failed to save. Reloading from server.
toasts.quickConfirmRequired: Name, price, and category are required

aiStudio.title: AI Studio
aiStudio.emptyDescription: Import your existing menu or add dishes manually, then use Dain Menu to improve descriptions, flag allergens, and translate your menu.
aiStudio.pageDescription: Practical AI tools that keep your menu accurate, multilingual, and guest-ready.
aiStudio.noCreditsBody: During early access, you can upgrade your plan to get more credits — all plans are free.
aiStudio.lowCreditsBody: Running low — use remaining credits on your highest-priority actions.
aiStudio.menuHealthDesc: Quick check on what your menu is missing before guests see it.
aiStudio.itemSelectionDesc: Choose specific items, or run on all.
aiStudio.rewriteCardDesc: Turn short or generic dish text into specific, appetizing descriptions that help guests decide what to order. Rewrites in {{lang}}.
aiStudio.allergensCardDesc: Scan dish descriptions and ingredients to detect common allergens — gluten, dairy, nuts, seafood, eggs, soy, peanuts, and shellfish.
aiStudio.caloriesCardDesc: Add estimated calorie counts based on dish ingredients and typical portion sizes. Helps health-conscious guests choose confidently.
aiStudio.bottomNavText: After running AI actions, check the result in
aiStudio.buddyClearMsg: Your menu has no urgent gaps — AI Studio is ready when you are.
aiStudio.translateCardDesc: Translate item names and descriptions so international guests can read your menu in their language.

toasts.notEnoughCredits: Not enough credits — need {{need}}, you have {{have}}.
toasts.alreadyUpToDate: {{label}} — all items already up to date
toasts.aiUnavailable: AI features are unavailable right now — please try again later.
toasts.aiQuotaExceeded: AI quota exceeded — please try again in a few minutes.

entryBanner.writeDescriptions_one: Write descriptions for {{count}} dish — guests need context to decide what to order
entryBanner.writeDescriptions_other: Write descriptions for {{count}} dishes — guests need context to decide what to order

buddy.missingDescImpact: Guests only see the dish name — no context to help them decide what to order.
buddy.missingDescAction: Run Rewrite Descriptions to generate compelling copy for all of them.
buddy.missingAllergensImpact: Guests with dietary restrictions can't see what to avoid — a safety and trust gap.
buddy.missingAllergensAction: Run Flag Allergens to detect common allergens from dish descriptions automatically.
buddy.lowTranslationIssue: {{lang}} translation is {{pct}}% done — {{remaining}} items still in your base language.
buddy.lowTranslationImpact: {{lang}}-speaking guests see untranslated text for those dishes.
buddy.lowTranslationAction: Run Translate Menu and select {{lang}} to fill the gaps automatically.
buddy.missingCaloriesIssue_one: No calorie information on any of your {{count}} dish yet.
buddy.missingCaloriesIssue_other: No calorie information on any of your {{count}} dishes yet.
buddy.missingCaloriesImpact: Health-conscious guests can't gauge portions or plan their meal.
buddy.missingCaloriesAction: Run Estimate Calories to add calorie counts automatically.

qr.title: QR & Sharing
qr.menuReady: Your menu is ready to share
qr.menuNeedsItems: Your menu needs a few more items
qr.unavailableItems_one: {{count}} item marked unavailable — guests won't see it.
qr.unavailableItems_other: {{count}} items marked unavailable — guests won't see them.
qr.tableTentDesc: Place a card on each table — guests scan instead of waiting for a menu.
qr.receiptsFlyersDesc: Add to printed materials for repeat visits and takeout reorders.
qr.windowDoorDesc: Let passersby preview the menu before walking in.
qr.bottomCtaText: Need to update your menu before sharing?

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your restaurant profile, business details, and operating configuration.

identity.title: Restaurant Identity
identity.desc: How your restaurant appears to guests and across the product.

contact.title: Business Contact
contact.desc: How customers and partners can reach you.

legal.title: Legal & Official Details
legal.descOpen: Official business registration and tax information. Not shown to guests.
legal.descClosed: Tax, registration, and compliance information — most restaurants leave this empty.

operating.title: Operating Information
operating.desc: Hours, services, languages, and locale settings.

design.title: Guest Menu Design
design.desc: The visual appearance of your digital menu.

social.title: Public & Social
social.desc: Links and contact info for your guests.

fields.brandNameHint: If your brand name differs from your legal or registered name.
fields.shortDescHint: Shown on your guest menu header and QR sharing page.
fields.legalCompanyNameHint: The registered company name as it appears on official documents.
fields.taxNumberHint: Steuernummer, EIN, or local tax ID.
fields.registeredAddressHint: Only if different from the restaurant address above.
fields.openingHoursHint: Displayed on your guest menu. Use a simple readable format.
fields.holidayNotesHint: Upcoming closures, seasonal changes, or special hours.
fields.menuLanguageHint: The language your menu items are written in. The AI uses this for rewrites, translations, and allergen detection.
fields.translationTargetsHint: Guest-facing — guests can read in these languages. To run AI translations, use AI Studio.
fields.localeHint: For number formats and date display.
fields.allergyPlaceholder: e.g., Please inform your server about any food allergies or dietary requirements.
fields.supportedLanguagesNote: Supported languages can be translated via AI Studio. Languages marked 'not yet available' can be selected here but cannot be translated until support is added.
fields.customBrandingNote: Custom branding is available on Starter ($19/mo) and Pro plans.
fields.previewNote: Changes take effect after you save. Preview your menu in the
fields.invoicesHint: Invoices and receipts will be sent here.
fields.billingNotesHint: PO number, cost center, or any reference you need on invoices.

billing.title: Plan & Credits
billing.creditCostDesc: Each AI action has a fixed per-item cost.
billing.creditCostDescMenu: Each AI action has a fixed per-item cost. Here's what your {{n}}-item menu costs.
billing.upcomingPlansDesc: A preview of what's coming — plans and pricing are not yet final.
billing.creditHistoryDesc: Recent AI actions and credit changes.
billing.typicalScenarios: Typical monthly scenarios for your {{n}}-item menu
billing.paidPlansComingSoon: Paid plan upgrades are coming soon. You can explore all AI features now using your free credits.
billing.paymentTitle: Payment processing coming in a future release
billing.paymentDesc: Real payment processing (credit card, PayPal, Apple Pay, Google Pay) is in development. During early access, all plans and credits are free — no card required.

name.title: What's your restaurant called?
name.sub: Your name appears at the top of the guest menu — the first thing diners see when they scan your QR code.
name.placeholder: e.g. Bella Cucina, The Corner Bistro…
name.changeAnytime: You can change this anytime in Settings.
name.errorNetwork: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.

choose.title: How would you like to start?
choose.sub: Import an existing menu, scan dish photos one by one, or start adding dishes manually — your choice.
choose.importSub: Upload a PDF, photo, or paste your menu text. We'll extract dish names, prices, and categories for you to review.
choose.scanSub: Photograph individual dishes and add them one by one — ideal if you have no full menu document.
choose.manualCta: I'll add dishes manually — skip for now

import.reading: Reading {{fileName}} for dishes, prices, and categories.
import.scanningText: Extracting dishes, prices, and categories from your text.
import.heading: Upload or paste your menu
import.subheading: We'll extract dish names, prices, and categories. You'll review everything before it goes live.
import.dropPrompt: Drop a file here, or click to browse
import.dropAccepted: PDF, JPG, PNG, WEBP — up to 18 MB
import.extractDetail: dish names, categories, prices, and descriptions — wherever they appear in the file. You'll review everything before it saves.
import.bestResultsDetail: flat, well-lit photo · all text visible · no glare or blur · PDF exports from your POS work great. iPhone photos? Export as JPG — HEIC isn't supported.
import.addManually: Add dishes manually in Menu Builder →
import.pastePrompt:
Paste your menu here. For example:

Starters
Bruschetta — $8
Soup of the day — $6

Mains
Grilled salmon — $22
Pasta carbonara — $16
import.pasteMinLength: Paste at least a few dish names and prices to continue.
import.pasteWorksBestDetail: copy-pasted text from your existing digital menu, website, or a typed-up list. Include prices and section names for best results.
import.noDishesFile: No dishes were found in this file. Check that it contains a menu, or try uploading a clearer image.
import.noDishesFilePartial: We couldn't extract any dishes from this file. The image may be too blurry or the text too small — try a clearer photo, or paste the menu text instead.
import.noDishesText: No dishes were found in the text. Make sure it includes dish names and prices, then try again.

done.title: Your menu is ready!
done.readyToBuildSub: Your workspace is set up — add your first dishes, then share your QR code or link when you're ready.
done.reviewCtaSub: Your workspace — review every dish and run AI improvements in context.
done.buildCtaSub: Your workspace is ready — add dishes and your guest menu goes live.

errors.heic: {{name}} is an iPhone HEIC photo. Please export it as JPG first: share the photo → select "JPG" format, or take a screenshot and upload that instead.
errors.tooLarge: {{name}} is too large ({{sizeMb}} MB). Maximum is 18 MB.
errors.unsupportedFormat: "{{name}}" isn't a supported format. Please upload a PDF, JPG, PNG, or WEBP file.
errors.aiUnavailable: AI parsing is unavailable right now. You can add dishes manually.
errors.couldNotRead: We couldn't read the menu. Try a clearer file or paste the text directly.
errors.saveFailed: Failed to save. Please try again.
errors.networkSave: Network error saving the menu. Please try again.

copilot.title: Copilot
copilot.loadError: Unable to load health data. Try refreshing.
copilot.noIssues: No issues found. Keep adding items and translations to grow your menu.
copilot.placeholder: Try: rewrite descriptions, translate to Spanish…
copilot.helpHint: I can help with: {{hints}}, and more.

review.couldNotReadDesc: The AI couldn't extract menu items from this file. Try a clearer photo or paste the text manually.
review.noDishesLeftDesc: You removed all extracted dishes. Go back and try again.
review.reviewBeforeImportDesc: Edit names, prices, or descriptions before confirming.
review.everythingLooksGood: Everything looks good — confirm when ready.
review.willBeAdded: These items will be added to your existing {{count}} dishes — nothing will be replaced.
review.foundButMissed: We found {{count}} dishes but may have missed some. Review carefully.
review.emptyNames: One or more dish names are empty. Fill in every name before importing.
review.discardAll: Discard all extracted dishes and start manually?

enhance.title: Enhance with AI
enhance.reviewApprove: AI prepared these items — review and approve before guests see them.

subtitles.missingDesc_other: {{count}} dishes have no description — AI can write them
subtitles.missingAllergens_one: {{count}} dish may be missing allergen labels — AI can tag them
subtitles.missingAllergens_other: {{count}} dishes may be missing allergen labels — AI can tag them
subtitles.missingCalories_one: {{count}} dish has no calorie estimate — AI can add them
subtitles.missingCalories_other: {{count}} dishes have no calorie estimate — AI can add them
